label: 03 · Engagement
title: Three ways to work with us.
lede: Pick the shape that fits. Or tell us about your problem and we'll suggest which one makes sense.

items.name: Discovery
items.description: For when you know AI should help somewhere in your business but don't know where to start.

items.name: Build
items.description: One well-scoped application, designed, built, tested, and handed off. Our typical engagement.

items.name: Review
items.description: For teams already building with AI who want a second pair of eyes on architecture, prompts, or evaluations.
